steps.title: Use the research signal
steps.content: Maize shows so little resemblance to any wild plant that genetic research was necessary. That means the research had to establish which wild plant was actually maize's ancestor, not obtain, create, or attract that plant.

steps.title: Match the precise verb
steps.content: Choice A means obtain, but the text is about identifying an ancestor. Choice B means create or cause to grow, but the ancestral relationship already existed. Choice C means draw something in, which does not fit scientific verification. To confirm means to establish as true, which matches the role of genetic research. The answer is D.
